name: vibe-guard
description: AI-aware code security auditor that detects backdoors, vulnerabilities, and malicious patterns — especially in AI-generated (vibe-coded) code. Triggers on: 'check code for security issues', 'scan for backdoors', 'audit this code', 'is this code safe', 'review security', 'vibe-guard', 'backdoor detection', 'supply chain attack', or any doubt about code trustworthiness.
